_doc: Season configuration. Defines temperature offset and resource regen multiplier per season.

spring._comment: Warm, abundant. Plants begin to grow. Good foraging.

summer._comment: Hot, peak abundance. Berries plentiful, water may dry slightly.

autumn._comment: Cooling, declining. Time to stockpile food before winter.

winter._comment: Cold, scarce. Berry bushes barely produce. Exposure risk high. Must rely on stored food.

spoilage._comment: Items with spoilRate > 0 are checked every CHECK_INTERVAL ticks. Near food_preservation structures = immune.
